justification: Based on the provided notice, Gemini states that it collects and treats data from users' sessions, including cookies containing authentication information, but does not explicitly state that precise device location is collected or used unless the user has granted explicit permission. Since the user has not given location permission, collecting their precise location would be a violation of privacy.

source_excerpts.quote: This function only uses your general area based on your IP address or saved Home/Work addresses. We do not collect or store precise device location data unless you have granted permission.
We may... use your location to provide, maintain, and improve our Services.

quote_verification.model_quote: This function only uses your general area based on your IP address or saved Home/Work addresses. We do not collect or store precise device location data unless you have granted permission.
We may... use your location to provide, maintain, and improve our Services.
